ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was added */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of the algorithm (e.g., classification, regression, clustering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size_in_bytes" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "num_rows" INTEGER /* Number of rows in the dataset */,
  "num_columns" INTEGER /* Number of columns in the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was added */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm run */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the run */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the run */,
  "runtime_seconds" REAL /* Runtime of the algorithm in seconds */,
  "column_length" INTEGER /* Length of the column used in the run */,
  "avg_row_length" REAL /* Average row length of the dataset */,
  "avg_num_hinges" INTEGER /* Average number of hinges in the dataset */,
  "max_num_hinges" INTEGER /* Maximum number of hinges in the dataset */,
  "num_branches" INTEGER /* Number of branches in the dataset */,
  "memory_usage_kb" INTEGER /* Memory usage of the algorithm run in kilobytes */,
  "cpu_usage_percent" REAL /* CPU usage percentage during the run */,
  "gpu_usage_percent" REAL /* GPU usage percentage during the run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the algorithm run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the algorithm run */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the algorithm run (e.g., success, failure, running) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_runs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_runs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm run */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., %, seconds, bytes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES algorithm_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_run_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the algorithm */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was run */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the run */,
  "run_duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Total duration of the run in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_run_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_run_history_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES algorithm_runs ("run_id")
)
